name: STEIIARIA
short_description: STEIIARIA - Endless space lo-fi adventure for all lovers of puzzles and fun! Mahjong, space and planets come together to give you the ultimate gameplay and music enjoyment in this game.
detailed_description:
STEIARIA is a 2D match 3 roguelike, a limitless space lo-fi adventure for all lovers of puzzles and fun! Mahjong, space and planet combine to give you a wonderful gaming experience and enjoy this game. Collect pairs of space rocks, conquer new groups and conquer new levels, but remember - the game is endless and will keep you entertained for as long as you need!

Features:
-Graphics ин YolkinS
-Misic by YolkinS
-Endless mode
